revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24744680692|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:東霧島神社]] {{Expand Japanese|東霧島神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Higashikirishima Shrine | native_name = 東霧島神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Higashikirishima Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|31.845399|131.059896}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Tsumakirishima Shrine'''|東霧島神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Hyūga Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11505106|ltq=Q11505106|qid=Q11505106|1=List of Shikinaisha in Hyūga Province}} ** Series ordinal: 4 ** P155: {{ill|Eda Shrine|lt=Eda Shrine|en|Eda Shrine|fr|Eda-jinja|ja|江田神社 (宮崎市)|qid=Q3047222|1=Eda Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Kagoshima Shrine|lt=Kagoshima Jingū|en|Kagoshima Shrine|fr|Kagoshima-jingū|ja|鹿児島神宮|zh|鹿兒島神宮|qid=Q704695|1=Kagoshima Jingū}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q513737|ltq=Q513737|qid=Q513737|1=Hyūga Province}} * {{ill|Q11632126|ltq=Q11632126|qid=Q11632126|1=Morokata district}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|31.845399|131.059896}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == described by source (P1343) == * {{ill|Q135037878|ltq=Q135037878|qid=Q135037878|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)}} ** P2699: https://web.archive.org/web/20160306092750/http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/640203.html == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 183327 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == P14005 (P14005) == * {{ill|Q11071125|ltq=Q11071125|qid=Q11071125|1=Junior Fifth Rank}} * {{ill|Q11071127|ltq=Q11071127|qid=Q11071127|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Q135041487|ltq=Q135041487|qid=Q135041487|1=Kirishimano Shrine}} ** P2868: {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '宮崎県都城市高崎町東霧島', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:東霧島神社]] {{wikidata link|Q135070353}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Higashikirishima Shrine |画像 = [[File:東霧島神社神石1.jpg|250px]]
Sacred stone |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Miyazaki Prefecture|Q130300|qid=Q130300|1=Miyazaki Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Miyakonojō|Q638301|qid=Q638301|1=Miyakonojō}}{{ill|lt=Takasaki-chō|Q7677528|qid=Q7677528|1=Takazaki, Miyazaki}}{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Higashikirishima|1=UNKNOWN}} 1560 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Izanagi-no-Mikoto|1=Izanagi|qid=Q813858}} |社格 = {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha (small shrine)|Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} (candidate shrine)
former {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=prefectural shrine|1=Ken-sha|qid=Q90139226}} |創建 = Trad. in the reign of {{ill|lt=Emperor Kōshō|Q312841|qid=Q312841|1=Emperor Kōshō}} |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = {{ill|lt=Kirishima Rokusha Gongen|Q11660872|qid=Q11660872|1=Kirishima Rokusha Gongen}} |例祭 = {{ill|lt=Vernal Equinox Day|Q1049141|qid=Q1049141|1=Vernal Equinox Day}} in March |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Miyazaki|label=Higashikirishima Shrine|position=right|width=200|float=center|caption=|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=10|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=270}} }} '''Higashikirishima Shrine''' (つまきりしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Higashikirishima|1=UNKNOWN}} (つまぎりしま), {{ill|lt=Miyakonojō|Q638301|qid=Q638301|1=Miyakonojō}}, {{ill|lt=Miyazaki Prefecture|Q130300|qid=Q130300|1=Miyazaki Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|lt=candidate shrine|Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} for an {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Engishiki shrine|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286|lt=Shikinaisha}}, and its former rank was prefectural shrine. === Overview === It is enshrined north of Miyakonojō, northwest of JR {{ill|lt=Higashi-Takasaki Station|Q8190158|qid=Q8190158|1=Higashi Takasaki Station}}. It is said to have been founded in the reign of the 5th emperor, {{ill|lt=Emperor Kōshō|Q312841|qid=Q312841|1=Emperor Kōshō}}. The shrine buildings were burned and buried in eruptions and fell into ruin, but in {{ill|lt=Ōwa|Q1324768|qid=Q1324768|1=Ōwa}} 3 ({{ill|lt=963|Q23562|qid=Q23562|1=963}}), the Tendai monk {{ill|lt=Shōkū|Q11491623|qid=Q11491623|1=Shōkū}} restored the shrine buildings, and in the Edo period it came to be called Higashikirishima Daigongen-gū[https://www.city.miyakonojo.miyazaki.jp/site/kanko/10670.html 東霧島神社] - Miyakonojō City[https://www.kanko-miyazaki.jp/spot/1022 東霧島神社] - Miyazaki Prefecture Tourism Association. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Izanagi-no-Mikoto|1=Izanagi|qid=Q813858}} === Precincts === * Oniiwa steps - said to have been built in one night by an ogre stacking 999 stones; also called the “Do Not Look Back Slope,” where wishes come true if one chants with full focus and reaches the top without turning around. * Shinseki (sacred stone) - said to be hardened tears of Izanagi-no-Mikoto after losing {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Izanami-no-Mikoto|1=Izanami|qid=Q682306}}, and its back has a sharp three-tiered cross section said to have been cut by Izanagi with a ten-hand sword (also a shrine treasure). === Notes === {{Reflist}} === Related items === * {{ill|lt=Kirishima Shrine|Q11660899|qid=Q11660899|1=Kirishima Shrine}} * {{ill|lt=Kirishima Rokusha Gongen|Q11660872|qid=Q11660872|1=Kirishima Rokusha Gongen}} === External links === * [https://tsumakirishimajinjya.com/ 東霧島神社] - official site ** {{Instagram|tumakirishima}} * [https://www.city.miyakonojo.miyazaki.jp/site/kanko/10670.html 東霧島神社] - Miyakonojō City * [https://www.kanko-miyazaki.jp/spot/1022 東霧島神社] - Miyazaki Prefecture Tourism Association {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Higashikirishima Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Higashikirishima Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Higashikirishima Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha in Hyūga Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Miyazaki Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Hyūga Province]] [[Category:山岳信仰]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Miyazaki Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Miyakonojo, Miyazaki]] [[Category:Municipal History of Miyakonojo]]==merged content== {{Expand Japanese|東霧島神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Tsumakirishima Shrine | native_name = 東霧島神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Tsumakirishima Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|31.845399|131.059896}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Tsumakirishima Shrine'''|東霧島神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Hyūga Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11505106|ltq=Q11505106|qid=Q11505106|1=List of Shikinaisha in Hyūga Province}} ** Series ordinal: 4 ** P155: {{ill|Q3047222|ltq=Q3047222|qid=Q3047222|1=Eda Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Kagoshima Shrine|lt=Kagoshima Jingū|en|Kagoshima Shrine|fr|Kagoshima-jingū|ja|鹿児島神宮|zh|鹿兒島神宮|qid=Q704695|1=Kagoshima Jingū}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q513737|ltq=Q513737|qid=Q513737|1=Hyūga Province}} * {{ill|Q11632126|ltq=Q11632126|qid=Q11632126|1=Morokata district}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|31.845399|131.059896}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == described by source (P1343) == * {{ill|Q135037878|ltq=Q135037878|qid=Q135037878|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)}} ** P2699: https://web.archive.org/web/20160306092750/http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/640203.html == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 183327 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == P14005 (P14005) == * {{ill|Q11071125|ltq=Q11071125|qid=Q11071125|1=Junior Fifth Rank}} * {{ill|Q11071127|ltq=Q11071127|qid=Q11071127|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Q135041487|ltq=Q135041487|qid=Q135041487|1=Kirishimano Shrine}} ** P2868: {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '宮崎県都城市高崎町東霧島', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:東霧島神社]] {{wikidata link|Q135070353}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Tsumakirishima Shrine |画像 = [[File:東霧島神社神石1.jpg|250px]]
Sacred stone |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Miyazaki Prefecture|Q130300|qid=Q130300|1=Miyazaki Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Miyakonojō|Q638301|qid=Q638301|1=Miyakonojō}}{{ill|lt=Takasaki-chō|Q7677528|qid=Q7677528|1=Takazaki, Miyazaki}}{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Higashikirishima|1=UNKNOWN}} 1560 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Izanagi-no-Mikoto|1=Izanagi|qid=Q813858}} |社格 = {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha (small shrine)|Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} (candidate shrine)
former {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=prefectural shrine|1=Ken-sha|qid=Q90139226}} |創建 = Trad. in the reign of {{ill|lt=Emperor Kōshō|Q312841|qid=Q312841|1=Emperor Kōshō}} |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = {{ill|lt=Kirishima Rokusha Gongen|Q11660872|qid=Q11660872|1=Kirishima Rokusha Gongen}} |例祭 = {{ill|lt=Vernal Equinox Day|Q1049141|qid=Q1049141|1=Vernal Equinox Day}} in March |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Miyazaki|label=Tsumakirishima Shrine|position=right|width=200|float=center|caption=|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=10|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=270}} }} '''Tsumakirishima Shrine''' (つまきりしまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Higashikirishima|1=UNKNOWN}} (つまぎりしま), {{ill|lt=Miyakonojō|Q638301|qid=Q638301|1=Miyakonojō}}, {{ill|lt=Miyazaki Prefecture|Q130300|qid=Q130300|1=Miyazaki Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|lt=candidate shrine|Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} for an {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Engishiki shrine|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286|lt=Shikinaisha}}, and its former rank was prefectural shrine. === Overview === It is enshrined north of Miyakonojō, northwest of JR {{ill|lt=Higashi-Takasaki Station|Q8190158|qid=Q8190158|1=Higashi Takasaki Station}}. It is said to have been founded in the reign of the 5th emperor, {{ill|lt=Emperor Kōshō|Q312841|qid=Q312841|1=Emperor Kōshō}}. The shrine buildings were burned and buried in eruptions and fell into ruin, but in {{ill|lt=Ōwa|Q1324768|qid=Q1324768|1=Ōwa}} 3 ({{ill|lt=963|Q23562|qid=Q23562|1=963}}), the Tendai monk {{ill|lt=Shōkū|Q11491623|qid=Q11491623|1=Shōkū}} restored the shrine buildings, and in the Edo period it came to be called Higashikirishima Daigongen-gū[https://www.city.miyakonojo.miyazaki.jp/site/kanko/10670.html 東霧島神社] - Miyakonojō City[https://www.kanko-miyazaki.jp/spot/1022 東霧島神社] - Miyazaki Prefecture Tourism Association. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Izanagi-no-Mikoto|1=Izanagi|qid=Q813858}} === Precincts === * Oniiwa steps - said to have been built in one night by an ogre stacking 999 stones; also called the “Do Not Look Back Slope,” where wishes come true if one chants with full focus and reaches the top without turning around. * Shinseki (sacred stone) - said to be hardened tears of Izanagi-no-Mikoto after losing {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Izanami-no-Mikoto|1=Izanami|qid=Q682306}}, and its back has a sharp three-tiered cross section said to have been cut by Izanagi with a ten-hand sword (also a shrine treasure). === Notes === {{Reflist}} === Related items === * {{ill|lt=Kirishima Shrine|Q11660899|qid=Q11660899|1=Kirishima Shrine}} * {{ill|lt=Kirishima Rokusha Gongen|Q11660872|qid=Q11660872|1=Kirishima Rokusha Gongen}} === External links === * [https://tsumakirishimajinjya.com/ 東霧島神社] - official site ** {{Instagram|tumakirishima}} * [https://www.city.miyakonojo.miyazaki.jp/site/kanko/10670.html 東霧島神社] - Miyakonojō City * [https://www.kanko-miyazaki.jp/spot/1022 東霧島神社] - Miyazaki Prefecture Tourism Association {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tsumakirishima Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tsumakirishima Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Hyūga Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Miyazaki Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Hyūga Province]] [[Category:山岳信仰]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Miyazaki Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Miyakonojo, Miyazaki]] [[Category:Municipal History of Miyakonojo]]
